items.title: Third language row: Demand for clarification from Karnataka Education Department
items.summary: Lack of clarity during the ongoing academic year’s examination period has pushed lakhs of students into mental stress and uncertainty, educationist Shabbir Mustafa said

items.title: NATO allies working to reopen the Strait of Hormuz spark fury from Trump
items.summary: Tensions grow between European countries and the U.S. over helping in the Strait of Hormuz and the future of NATO.

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Strait of Hormuz Largely Closed as Iran Says Parties Are Far From Final Deal
items.summary: Vessels that appeared to enter the strait on Sunday backtracked, seemingly unable to cross, according to a shipping monitor.
